metadata.description: RavenClaude — a private marketplace of opinionated Claude Code plugins. Starts with ravenclaude-core (the Team Lead + specialists pattern) and grows to include domain-specific plugins for Power Platform, finance, EdTech, and Salesforce work.

plugins.name: ravenclaude-core
plugins.description: Domain-neutral Claude Code plugin: 13 specialist agents (architect, coders, reviewers, designer, documentarian, deep-researcher, project-manager, partner-success-manager, prompt-engineer, etc.), team-lead dispatch playbook, format/lint/test gates, and templates for memos, runbooks, design specs, RAID logs, and partner-success artifacts.
